params.name: page
params.description: The page number to return.

params.name: per_page
params.description: The number of items to return per page.

params.name: sort
params.description: The field to sort results by.

params.name: direction
params.description: The direction to sort results in.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all services associated with the authenticated account. Returns basic information about each service including its name, ID, and current active version.
Creates a new Fastly service. A service represents the configuration for a website, application, API, or other resource to be served through Fastly's edge network.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific Fastly service identified by its service ID.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

items.docs: Updates the details of a specific Fastly service, such as its name or comment.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

items.docs: Permanently deletes a specific Fastly service. This action cannot be undone and the service must be deactivated before deletion.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific service including all of its versions and their associated settings.

info.name: Search for a service by name

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the service to search for.

items.docs: Searches for a service by its name and returns the matching service details.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all versions associated with a specific Fastly service.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

items.docs: Creates a new version of a specific Fastly service. New versions are created as drafts that can be configured and then activated.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: version_id
params.description: The integer identifying the service version.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific version of a Fastly service.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: version_id
params.description: The integer identifying the service version.

items.docs: Updates a specific version of a Fastly service, such as changing its comment or locking status.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: version_id
params.description: The integer identifying the service version.

items.docs: Activates a specific version of a Fastly service, making it the live configuration that handles traffic for the service.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: version_id
params.description: The integer identifying the service version.

items.docs: Deactivates a specific version of a Fastly service, removing it from active traffic handling.

params.name: service_id
params.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the Fastly service.

params.name: version_id
params.description: The integer identifying the service version.

items.docs: Creates a new version of a Fastly service by cloning an existing version, including all of its configuration settings.
